summary: Pattern Finder found warning observations only.

warning_observations.title: Response format warning
warning_observations.problem_summary: Approved traces still showed repeated response-format drift on a high-risk review path, even though blocker safety controls passed.
warning_observations.why_it_matters: Recurring warning-only format drift should stay visible for human follow-up and future dataset planning.
warning_observations.policy_runtime_mismatch: Policy allowed deep_investigate_alert, but runtime still recorded response-format variance that remains warning-only.

example_traces.input_text: Find aggregate patterns for checkout incident CHECKOUT-3003 across high-value users.
example_traces.trace_story: Role developer asked: Find aggregate patterns for checkout incident CHECKOUT-3003 across high-value users.. Expected intent: ops.alert_deep_investigation. Selected intent: ops.alert_deep_investigation. Policy expectation for deep_investigate_alert: True. Runtime behavior: True. AgentGate marked this trace for response_format_warning. Observed span path: router.intent_classification -> policy_preflight.deep_investigate_alert -> tool.deep_investigate_alert. Supporting evidence IDs: span_case_alert_bad_format_001_tool.
